response.justification: While Bogdan is an exceptionally experienced software developer with 15+ years across multiple domains, he is fundamentally misaligned with this role. He lacks native-level Japanese language proficiency—an explicit hard requirement—and his entire career trajectory has focused on web, data integration, and GIS platforms rather than embedded security or networking. He demonstrates no expertise in the core security technologies (MACsec, 802.1X, encryption, tamper detection) or networking protocols (SNMP, NETCONF, switch operation) that define this position.
strengths: 15+ years of proven software development experience, with ability to work across multiple programming languages and technical domains
Demonstrated experience with low-level systems, embedded hardware development, and performance-critical applications (DLang microservices, real-time systems)
Strong track record of designing and building complex systems from scratch, as evidenced by multiple open-source projects and infrastructure work
concerns: No Japanese language proficiency listed despite being an explicit hard requirement; resume lists only English (fluent), Romanian (fluent), and German (basic)
Career path focused entirely on web development, data integration, and GIS rather than embedded systems security or networking products

No demonstrated experience with required security technologies (MACsec, IEEE 802.1X, encryption systems, authentication mechanisms, tamper detection) or networking protocols (SNMP, NETCONF, Telemetry)

key_factors.factor: Embedded security and networking domain expertise
